events.title: Homburg Flea & Antiques Market
events.summary: Largest flea and antiques market in southwest Germany, around the Forum in Homburg. 08:00–16:00.
events.familyRelevance: Browse secondhand finds and antiques — about 15 minutes from Waldmohr.
